# cboxdk/statamic-telemetry

> A Statamic 6 addon overlaying cboxdk/laravel-telemetry. It teaches the
> base package's traces and metrics Statamic's vocabulary: content-named
> request spans, Stache and static-cache instrumentation, site and user
> context, and Statamic-specific counters. A thin overlay built entirely
> on the base package's public extension points — no exporter or store of
> its own. Facade for the base package: Cbox\Telemetry\Facades\Telemetry.

Key facts: Statamic 6 only (statamic/cms ^6.0). Everything on by default
except Antlers view/tag spans and inventory gauges. Metric names are
lowercase dot-namespaced (statamic.static_cache.operations →
statamic_static_cache_operations_total in Prometheus). Span attributes may
be high-cardinality (ids, slugs); metric labels are always bounded.
Telemetry never throws into the app — resolvers run in the base package's
FailSafe, listeners extend a GuardedListener base that does the same.

## Documentation

- [Overview](docs/index.md): what the addon does and how it plugs in
- [Reference](docs/reference.md): every span attribute, metric, config toggle, and source event — read this first
- [Design notes](docs/design-notes.md): why it is built this way — catch-all naming, subclassed cachers, header stripping, Blink, Antlers, the never-throw invariant
- [README](README.md): quick start, composition examples, Grafana dashboard

## Extension points used (in cboxdk/laravel-telemetry)

- nameRequestsUsing / enrichRequestsUsing: content-derived root span name and attributes
- resolveUserUsing: Statamic user roles/groups/super
- classifyCacheKeysUsing: Stache cache-key grouping
- Telemetry::context: site as an ambient dimension
- TelemetryProvider contract: opt-in inventory gauges
- Tracer::bumpStat / rootSpan: Blink tallies, static-cache outcome attribute

## Key source

- src/ServiceProvider.php: registration — driver swap, Blink binding, listeners, Antlers tracer, gauges
- src/Support/Content.php: request span naming from ResponseCreated data (unwraps Structures\Page)
- src/Support/CacheKeys.php: Stache cache-key classifier
- src/StaticCaching/: tracing cacher subclasses, outcome recording, trace-header stripping
- src/Listeners/GuardedListener.php: the never-throw base for all listeners
- src/View/: Antlers view-engine wrap and runtime tag tracer
- resources/grafana/generate.py: the bundled Statamic dashboard generator
